title: PlayerParticles
description: A particle plugin designed for players and blocks!
body:
![PlayerParticles](https://imgur.com/fstru9k.png)

  ![Description](https://imgur.com/MPZOC0Q.png) **PlayerParticles** is a **cosmetic particles plugin** that is fantastic for use as an EULA-friendly perk! This plugin is used for spawning particles around players and blocks, bringing together **style** and **aesthetics** to make your server stand out. ![Feature List](https://imgur.com/lqj9dOL.png)     ![Features](https://imgur.com/1kdnDJy.png) **PlayerParticles** is easy to use, with an **in-game GUI** to customize your personal particles. Check out some of its features: - Apply particles to **players and blocks**. - **EULA-friendly** perk for your server. - Easy to use **in-game GUI**. - Create **custom combinations** by combining any style and effect together. - **Save your particles** to always remember your favorite combinations. - Create **preset groups** to share with players. - **All in-game particles** available to be used. - **Permissions** for every single style and effect. - Edit available **particle data** for extra creativity.     ![Showcase](https://imgur.com/mwz147C.png)  
See the plugin in action! ![Arrows](https://gyazo.com/8e5994d69f4907fd937209c688ef5341.gif) ![Batman](https://gyazo.com/570e6ddfe4b2c48e083e0c17712b3069.gif)     ![Documentation](https://imgur.com/wUufwBX.png) To learn about the **commands and permissions** of **PlayerParticles**, [check out our **wiki**](https://wiki.rosewooddev.io/PlayerParticles/introduction/)!  

    ![Support](https://imgur.com/VNxgt6I.png) If you need any **help**, have found a **bug**, or you have any **questions**, please [join our **Discord** server](https://discord.gg/MgUsTBK)! We offer all support through our server. Feel free to use the **support channels** to ask questions!  

    ![Thank You](https://imgur.com/OJ75iHT.png) A **big thanks** to everyone who supports us and uses our plugins! A lot of time and love goes into them. If you like this plugin, [check out our other **plugins**](https://modrinth.com/organization/rosewood-development)! If you want to give us some **extra support**, we would be absolutely grateful if you considered [subscribing to our **Patreon**](https://www.patreon.com/RosewoodDevelopment)!
